title: Crowns of Resemblance
summary: I was honored to create the cover of H.K. Laurin's Special Edition release of Crowns of Resemblance.
overview: H.K. Laurin is such a talented write with beautiful prose. I wanted to ensure this special release did her book justice. We concepted ideas together and in a short turnaround, I had her print ready design ready for her. She loved the design and readers did too.
